ops.body: Verified: internal/packs/{registry,discover,manifest,lint,scaffold}.go implement the pack subsystem; /api/packs and /packs/{pack}/{file} routes live in internal/daemon/packs_http.go; pack.interaction is validated at internal/daemon/rest.go:239-253 and reduced LWW at internal/state/reduce.go:276-285.
